indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ai_usage_log_pkey ON public.ai_usage_log USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_ai_usage_log_user_recent ON public.ai_usage_log USING btree (user_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_ai_usage_log_user_endpoint ON public.ai_usage_log USING btree (user_id, endpoint, created_at DESC)

rls_policies.qual:
(auth.uid() = ( SELECT users.auth_user_id
   FROM users
  WHERE (users.id = ai_usage_log.user_id)))
rls_policies.policy_name: Users can view own AI usage
Service role can insert AI usage

CREATE INDEX idx_proof_cards_public_verified ON public.proof_cards USING btree (user_id) WHERE ((visibility = 'public'::visibility_status) AND (verification_status = 'verified'::verification_status) AND (deleted_at IS NULL))
CREATE INDEX idx_proof_cards_deleted_at ON public.proof_cards USING btree (deleted_at) WHERE (deleted_at IS NOT NULL)

rls_policies.qual:
((deleted_at IS NULL) AND (visibility = 'public'::visibility_status) AND (verification_status = 'verified'::verification_status) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM users u
  WHERE ((u.id = proof_cards.user_id) AND (u.deleted_at IS NULL) AND (u.is_profile_public = true) AND (u.account_status = 'active'::account_status)))))
